info.name: [QRIS] CPM
info.description: QRIS Consumer Presented Mode (CPM) API collection. Covers the full CPM payment lifecycle including QR generation, inquiry, payment processing, reversal, refund, and settlement for both On-Us and Off-Us scenarios.

exec: // Optionally, log the values to the Postman console for confirmation

request.description: Initiate a refund for a completed CPM payment.
Check the status of a CPM refund.
Retrieve list of transactions eligible for refund validation.
Verify consumer Netzpin before processing payment.
